## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the [CLA](../docs/CLA.md) (the bot will prompt for a one-click signature).
- [ ] This PR is **one logical change** with a surgical diff — no unrelated refactors or reformatting.
- [ ] It does **not** modify maintainer-only zones (AGENTS.md/standards, LICENSE/CLA/trademark, SECURITY/support policy, CI/release workflows, security-boundary code). See [PR governance](../docs/contributing/pr-governance.md) — PRs touching those are declined; open an issue to discuss instead.

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on Linux
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style guidelines (`AGENTS.md`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] CI passes (lint, format, typecheck, tests, i18n) — no new warnings or errors
